{{CargoClone
|name=Hercules
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=200
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Earth DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=When HP < 30%, {race} DMG REDUC +0.6%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=When HP < 30%, {race} DMG REDUC +1%
|}}
